skills.name: Impaler
skills.description: Impale a Small or Medium-sized monster with the spear. Skewered enemies have their Physical Defense reduced and cannot Evade nor Block. Striking down with the impaled enemy triggers a critical attack.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
Duration: 10 seconds
Number of Attacks: 1
Targets: CaptionRatio3
Decreases Physical Defense of skewered enemy by 30%

skills.name: Earth Wave
skills.description: Use your weapon to attack the enemy by smashing it to the ground.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Trot
skills.description: Increases your movement speed while riding. Consumes SP every 5 seconds for the duration of the buff. Buff is removed when the player dismounts or runs out of SP.
skills.effect_text:
Movement Speed + CaptionRatio
Consumes 20 SP every 5 seconds

skills.name: Steed Charge
skills.description: Charge into the enemy, dealing damage. Applies a 3-second slow debuff on enemies when critical damage occurs.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Doom Spike
skills.description: Strongly stabs the enemy with the tip of your spear, decreasing critical resistance. The attack has a minimum critical chance.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x5
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Minimum Critical Rate: CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Rush
skills.description: Spin the spear above your head to inflict damage all around. Ignores enemies' block, and applies double the critical rate to those affected by [Fear].
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.3 seconds
Maximum Duration: 3 seconds
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Consumes CaptionRatio3 SP every 0.3 seconds

attributes.name: Spear Expertise: Destroy Magic Circle
attributes.description:
* Stack 1 [Destroy Magic Circle] Buff per 1 second when moving

* 1 [Destroy Magic Circle] Buff stack reduced per 1 second when standing

* Destroy 1 magic circle when using Spear Throw, Steed Charge, Gae Bulg during 10 stack.

attributes.name: Impaler: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Impaler] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Earth Wave: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Earth Wave] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

* Increases the skill factor of [Doom Spike] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rush: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rush] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Two-handed Spear Mastery: Penetration
attributes.description: * Penetrates 10% of an enemy's block chance per attribute level when equipped with a [Two-handed Spear]

attributes.name: Acrobatic Mount: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Acrobatic Mount]'s mounted skill damage increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Rush: Pull
attributes.description: * Enemies are gradually drawn toward the you while using [Rush], and enemies take more damage the closer they are to you.

attributes.name: [Arts] Impaler: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Impaler] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Earth Wave: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Earth Wave] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Steed Charge] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Doom Pike] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Rush: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Rush] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Steed Charge: Fire Chariot
attributes.description:
* Decreases Movement Distance and Damage of [Steed Charge] by half

* Skill's property changes to Fire, and flame is created in the movement distance.

* The fire path lasts for 5 seconds, and the enemy hitting the flame takes half the damage of the Steed Charge every 1 second

* Increases cooldown by 17 seconds
